description: Product Description Red Santa Sack With Santa Face Design Ho Ho Ho, Merry Christmas To You All! Santa Claus Is Coming To Town! See Your Kids Faces On Christmas Morning Beam With Pure Delight When They See Their Giant Santa Sacks Overflowing With Brightly Wrapped Gifts. Our Large Christmas Sacks Are Made Of A Quality Red Felt Fabric With A Thick White Felt Trim At The Top, A White Drawstring Handle For Easy Carrying, And Have A Cute Father Christmas Face With A White Beard And Santa Hat Embellishment On The Front (So The Kids Know Who‚Äôs Been!) Each Xmas Santa Sack Measures Approximately 35‚ÄĚ (90cm) Tall By 24‚ÄĚ (60cm) Wide And Are Perfect For Kids Santa Sacks / Christmas Stockings, Your Shops Christmas Window Display Props, To Festively Decorate Your House, For Christmas Charity Events, To Add To A Santa Suit Costume, And For A Santa‚Äôs Grotto Prop. These Big Santa Sacks Come In Packs Of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, And 6, So You Can Use Them For Your Own Children And As An Ideal Way To Present Gifts To The Grand Children, Nieces And Nephews, And Other Friends And Family Members Too. A Little Bit of Info... Different Pack Sizes Available
